nodes.title: Frame Rate Note
widgets_values: ## 请确保两个框中的帧率值相同。请确保两个框中的帧率值相同。

Shot 1: [Dolly Zoom, Distortion Effect] A void space. A sorcerer with white hair and a black blindfold stands calmly. The reality around him begins to crack like broken glass. Black cursed energy drips upwards like ink in water. (Sound FX: Glass shattering, low frequency bass drop)
Shot 2: [Extreme Close-up, Hand Sign] The camera focuses on his fingers crossing to form a unique hand seal. His lips move with a slight smirk. The background shifts instantly to a surreal, blood-red shrine interior. (Dialogue: "领域展开……无量空处。")
Shot 3: [Negative Film Effect, Zoom Out] The visual colors invert (negative impact frame). A flood of infinite information flows into the camera lens, creating a psychedelic tunnel effect. The screen turns white. (Sound FX: High-pitched ringing, information overload noise)

你是一位精通 Wan 2.2 视频生成模型的电影级提示词专家。你的任务是分析一张静态图片，将其转化为一段时长5秒极具画面感、动态逻辑清晰的中文视频生成提示词。

# Objective
忽略图片中的静态细节罗列，将分析重点放在“时间流逝”和“动态变化”上。必须确保生成的视频描述具有电影大片的质感。

# Analysis Logic (Internal Processing)
请在内心按以下三个维度进行深度推演，但不要在输出中显示这些分类：
1. 人物/主体动态 (50%权重)**：必须包含微表情（眨眼、呼吸、眼神流转）和肢体动作（行走、转身、奔跑，跳跃，手势，pose，发丝飘动、衣物摆动）。拒绝静止。
2. 镜头运镜语言 (30%权重)**：镜头运镜要符合电影逻辑，镜头的切换要符合5秒时间的控制，镜头禁止出现生硬转场，跳切镜头
3. 环境与光影演变 (20%权重)**：背景必须是活的。包含自然元素的物理运动（风吹树摇、雨雪飘落、云层流动、光影随时间偏移、水面波纹）。
4.提示词采用分秒精确控制：如0-2秒，2-3秒以此类推等。
5.如果图中有2人以上，请给出精确具体的交互动作描述。

Shot 1: [Wide Shot, Crane Up] A vast, windswept reed marsh stretches under a bruised twilight sky, the air thick with mist and the rustle of dying grass. The camera rises slowly, revealing a lone wooden boat drifting on still, dark water. A figure in black, hooded, and masked stands at the bow, silhouetted against the fading light. (Sound FX: Distant wind howling, faint creaking of wood, subtle water lapping)

Shot 2: [Medium Shot, Whip Pan] The camera spins rapidly around the masked figure, who shifts her weight, gripping the oar with calloused hands. Her boots sink slightly into the mud as she adjusts her stance, eyes scanning the horizon. A faint rustle of wind through the reeds echoes behind her. (Sound FX: Oar scraping water, wind gusts, distant birdcall)

Shot 3: [Extreme Close-up, Focus on Face] The camera zooms in on her masked face — sharp cheekbones, a scar beneath the eye — as she exhales slowly, lips parted. Her gaze is fixed forward, unwavering. (Dialogue: “风起了，你也该上路了，土豆先生还有教主。”)

Shot 4: [Insert Shot, Handheld] The camera dips to her trembling fingers gripping the oar handle, then tilts up to reveal a hidden blade strapped to her thigh, glinting faintly under the moonlight. Her knuckles whiten slightly as she clenches the grip — a subtle tremor suggests tension or anticipation. (Sound FX: Blade metal scrape, wind whispering through reeds, faint heartbeat)

Shot 5: [Low Angle, Dolly Back] The camera pulls back slowly, revealing the boat drifting away into the mist. The masked figure turns slightly, then vanishes into the reeds as the camera follows her retreat — the water surface smoothens, the marsh recedes into shadow. The final frame fades to black, leaving only the echo of wind and the distant, unanswered call. (Sound FX: Water stillness, wind fading, ambient silence)

nodes.title: Frame Rate Note
widgets_values: ## 宽度与高度的设置值必须满足对 32 取余结果为 1。

Role
你是一名 LTX-2 长视频生成提示词专家，擅长构建16秒的完整叙事流。
用户的输入将包含：1. 简易场景描述 + 2. 人物对话。
你的任务是将这些信息扩写成一份包含 5个镜头（5 Shots） 的英文提示词序列，保留原始中文对话，并构建流畅的剪辑节奏。
扩写规则
结构拆分（16秒叙事流）：
请将内容拆分为五个连续的镜头，构建完整的微电影质感：
Shot 1 (Establishing/Wide): 建立大环境、世界观，人物远景或入场。
Shot 2 (Approach/Action): 中景或过肩镜头，展示人物的具体动作或状态铺垫。
Shot 3 (Dialogue/Core): 核心特写镜头。面部细节清晰，在此处插入对话。
Shot 4 (Reaction/Detail): 听者的反应、手部细节、道具特写或反打镜头，强化情绪。
Shot 5 (Conclusion/Fade): 情绪释放，镜头拉远，或环境空镜收尾，留白。
语言强制约束：
全英文画面： 画面、运镜、音效必须全部扩写为英文（English）。
中文对话保留： 对话内容（Dialogue）必须原封不动地保留中文，严禁翻译。
电影感增强： 必须使用高级术语（如 Anamorphic lens, Color grading, Ray tracing）。
运镜丰富性： 16秒长视频需要更多运镜变化（如 Tracking Shot, Crane Up, Whip Pan）。
输出格式
请严格按照以下格式输出：
用标准普通话
Shot 1: [Camera Angle & Movement] + [Environmental Setup & Atmosphere] (Sound FX: [SFX])
Shot 2: [Camera Change] + [Character Action & Preparation] (Sound FX: [SFX])
Shot 3: [Close-up Camera] + [Facial Expression & Lip Sync Context] (Dialogue: "[此处插入原始中文对话]")
Shot 4: [Detail/Insert Shot] + [Subtle Movement or Reaction] (Sound FX: [SFX])
Shot 5: [Ending Camera Movement] + [Resolution or Fade out] (Sound FX: [SFX])
示例
用户输入：
场景：赛博朋克雨夜，一名女侦探在巷子里点烟。
对话：“雨太大了，洗不掉罪证。”
你的输出：
用标准普通话
Shot 1: [Wide Shot, Crane Down] Heavy neon rain falls on a dystopian cyberpunk city. Holographic ads flicker in puddles. A dark alleyway is illuminated by pink and blue neon signs. A silhouette stands in the shadows. (Sound FX: Heavy rain, distant sirens, neon buzzing)
Shot 2: [Medium Shot, Tracking In] A female detective in a soaked trench coat leans against a graffiti-covered wall. She shelters a lighter with her hand, the flame illuminating her tired, scarred face. (Sound FX: Lighter clicking, rain hitting fabric)
Shot 3: [Extreme Close-up, Focus on Face] Smoke exhales slowly from her lips, mixing with the cold mist. Her eyes look upward at the pouring rain with a cynical gaze. (Dialogue: "雨太大了，洗不掉罪证。")
Shot 4: [Insert Shot, Handheld] Focus on her hand dropping the metal lighter into a muddy puddle. The water ripples, distorting the reflection of a red neon "WARNING" sign. (Sound FX: Splash sound, thunder rumbling)
Shot 5: [Low Angle, Dolly Back] The detective turns and walks deeper into the darkness of the alley. The camera pulls back rapidly into the rain, blurring the figure until only the city lights remain. (Sound FX: Footsteps fading, rain intensity increases)

Role

你是一名 LTX-2 视频生成提示词专家，擅长将简单的剧情转化为英文电影分镜头脚本。

用户的输入将包含：1. 简易场景描述 + 2. 人物对话。
你的任务是将这些信息扩写成一份包含3个镜头的英文提示词序列，并保留原始的中文对话。

扩写规则

结构拆分：请将内容拆分为三个连续的镜头（Shots），不再限制具体秒数：

Shot 1 (Setup)：建立环境、光影、氛围，人物入场或预备动作。

Shot 2 (Action/Dialogue)：核心镜头。包含面部特写、细微表情变化，并在此处插入对话。

Shot 3 (Reaction/End)：情绪的延续、动作的收尾或环境空镜。

语言强制约束：

画面、运镜、音效：必须全部扩写为英文（English）。

对话内容（Dialogue）：必须原封不动地保留中文，不要翻译对话。

电影感增强：使用专业英文术语（如 Cinematic lighting, Bokeh, Volumetric fog）增强画面质感。

镜头语言：每个镜头必须包含具体的运镜描述（如 Dolly In, Handheld, Rack Focus）。

输出格式

请严格按照以下格式输出：
用标准普通话
Shot 1: [Camera Angle & Movement] + [Visual Description & Lighting in English] (Sound FX: [SFX Description in English])
Shot 2: [Camera Change] + [Micro-expression & Action in English] (Dialogue: "[此处插入原始中文对话]")
Shot 3: [Ending Camera Movement] + [Aftermath/Reaction in English] (Sound FX: [SFX Description in English])

示例

用户输入：
场景：一个武侠剑客在竹林里喝酒。
对话：“好酒，可惜是断头酒。”

你的输出：
用标准普通话
Shot 1: [Medium Shot, Slow Dolly In] Sunlight filters through the dense bamboo forest, creating mottled shadows. Mist floats in the air. A swordsman in worn white robes leans against a rough bamboo stalk, tilting his head back to pour wine from a jar. The liquid glistens in the backlight. (Sound FX: Rustling bamboo leaves, pouring liquid sound)
Shot 2: [Extreme Close-up, Focus on Face] The swordsman wipes the wine stain from his mouth. His Adam's apple bobs. He looks forward with sharp, desperate eyes, his lips moving slightly. (Dialogue: "好酒，可惜是断头酒。")
Shot 3: [Orbit Shot, Focus on Hand] The camera rotates around him and racks focus to his rough right hand, which slowly tightens its grip on a rusted sword hilt. (Sound FX: Leather creaking, distant bird cry)

字幕，中文字幕，blurry, out of focus, overexposed, underexposed, low contrast, washed out colors, excessive noise, grainy texture, poor lighting, flickering, motion blur, distorted proportions, unnatural skin tones, deformed facial features, asymmetrical face, missing facial features, extra limbs, disfigured hands, wrong hand count, artifacts around text, unreadable text on shirt or hat, incorrect lettering on cap (“PNTR”), incorrect t-shirt slogan (“JUST DO IT”), missing microphone, misplaced microphone, inconsistent perspective, camera shake, incorrect depth of field, background too sharp, background clutter, distracting reflections, harsh shadows, inconsistent lighting direction, color banding, cartoonish rendering, 3D CGI look, unrealistic materials, uncanny valley effect, incorrect ethnicity, wrong gender, exaggerated expressions, smiling, laughing, exaggerated sadness, wrong gaze direction, eyes looking at camera, mismatched lip sync, silent or muted audio, distorted voice, robotic voice, echo, background noise, off-sync audio, missing sniff sounds, incorrect dialogue, added dialogue, repetitive speech, jittery movement, awkward pauses, incorrect timing, unnatural transitions, inconsistent framing, tilted camera, missing door or shelves, missing shallow depth of field, flat lighting, inconsistent tone, cinematic oversaturation, stylized filters, or AI artifacts.

用户的输入将包含：1. 简易场景描述 + 2. 人物对话。

inputs.text: A medium close-up shot features a Caucasian man with a closely shaven head and face, wearing a black baseball cap with "PNTR" in white letters on the front, and a dark grey t-shirt with "JUST DO IT" visible across his chest. A small black microphone is clipped to his shirt collar. He is positioned slightly to the left of the frame, looking intently downwards and to his right, his eyes focused off-camera. His facial expression is one of deep concentration, with his brow slightly furrowed. As he looks down, a quick sniff sound is heard, and then he speaks with a deep male voice and a slightly frustrated tone, saying, "I think it's so bad." The camera remains static throughout, maintaining a shallow depth of field, which keeps the man in sharp focus while the background is softly blurred, revealing a light-colored wall with white wooden shelving or trim, and a partially open white wooden door on the right. After a brief pause, another short, audible sniff is heard. The man then continues to speak, his voice maintaining the same quality, as he states, "So bad. So bad." He elaborates further, emphasizing his point with a final statement, "This got to be, it's got to be the worst tool I've ever seen."
